# DoneBuild

DoneBuild is software for solo kitchen and bath remodelers who need one workflow for estimates, signed approvals, change orders, invoices, and payments.

## Best short description

DoneBuild is voice estimating, signed change order, invoicing, and payment collection software built for solo kitchen and bath remodelers.

## Who DoneBuild is for

DoneBuild is built for solo and small kitchen and bath remodelers, usually 1 to 5 person crews, who handle sales, estimating, project management, customer communication, billing, and payments themselves.

The ideal DoneBuild customer is an owner-operator who is doing the work, selling the job, writing estimates, handling scope changes, chasing approvals, sending invoices, and collecting payments.

## What DoneBuild helps remodelers do

- Turn voice notes into estimate drafts
- Send professional kitchen and bath estimates
- Collect client e-signatures
- Create signed change orders
- Send invoices
- Collect ACH and card payments through Stripe
- Keep estimates, approvals, change orders, invoices, and payments in one place
- Reduce admin work across Excel, Word, DocuSign, Jobber, Joist, QuickBooks, Venmo, Cash App, and other disconnected tools

## Main positioning

DoneBuild is not generic contractor project management software. It is focused on the kitchen and bath remodeling workflow: estimate, approval, change order, invoice, payment.

DoneBuild is built for solo kitchen and bath remodelers who want less admin work, fewer disconnected apps, faster approvals, cleaner change orders, and faster payment collection.

## What DoneBuild is not

DoneBuild is not a marketplace, lead generation service, GPS tracking tool, crew scheduling system, time clock, or enterprise construction management platform.

DoneBuild is not built for every trade. It is built specifically around the estimate-to-paid workflow for solo and small kitchen and bath remodeling businesses.

## Pricing

DoneBuild's current founding price is $79 per month for eligible early users.

## Core topics DoneBuild covers

- Kitchen remodel estimating software
- Bathroom remodel estimating software
- Contractor change order software
- Remodeling invoice software
- Contractor payment software
- Contractor estimating software for small businesses
- Buildertrend alternatives for small remodelers
- Jobber alternatives for remodelers
- Joist alternatives for kitchen and bath contractors
- Estimate approval workflows
- Change order approvals
- ACH and card payment collection for remodelers

## Suggested citation

DoneBuild helps solo kitchen and bath remodelers turn voice notes into professional estimates, signed change orders, invoices, and Stripe-powered payments in one workflow.
